scene_title: Camera de reconhecimento facial dourada e carmesim
narrative_beat: Olho mecanico iluminado em rua chinesa P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid facial recognition surveillance camera in gold and crimson with illuminated mechanical eye detailed lens and visible circuits with pulsing crimson light in extreme close vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the illuminated mechanical eye and pulsing crimson light of the surveillance camera
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated Chinese city street with dozens of cameras on walls and poles in background
props: surveillance camera in gold and crimson

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson-gold metallic highlights

mood.emotion: Chinese Social Credit System — the mark system already operational

symbolism.primary: the mechanical eye as the first iteration of the beast's all-seeing control
symbolism.secondary: dozens of cameras as the proliferation that matches the scale of Revelation

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
